name: PROBING campaign (probe=full — the real-world default): seed 63 files, run the cursor-loop campaign with per-file content capture ON. Each iteration crawls one bounded chunk (batch_size 10 × max_batches 2 = 20 files) resuming from the previous cursor; every file is read once during the walk — SHA-256 + fmeta metadata ride each fold item, so the catalogue fills content-addressed in the same pass. Loop runs until an empty chunk: 20+20+20+3+0 → 5 body runs, iteration counter 4, total 63, zero probe errors.
